TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Son Yakop foksi == Son Yakop (Inkiris: James Ira Dickson, 1900 miheca 2 folad 23 romi'ad ‚Äď 1967 miheca 6 folad 15 romi'ad ) foksi, masofoc i Katimol Dakota no Amilika, Kristokiw Ciwlo kiwkay a Singkiwsi, o fa'inay ni Sun Lilian (Lillian R. Dickson) patirengay to Kristokiw sapaloma lekapot tamdaw, tayni Taywan mala mikotayay 'a'isidan no Tamkang Congkako, Taywan sinkakoyin ato Taywan Kristo Ciwlo kiwkay Seisho kakoyin a 'a'isidan, misarocor ko faloco' saki yincumin no Taywan sinkiw ato kiwiko a tayal. I 1967 miheca ona ciadada a mapatay, matadem i Taywan sinkakoyin . Kasofocan I 1927 miheca misawad nai sinkakoyin no Princeton daykako. Toya miheca, mararamod aci Sun Lilian (Lillian R. Dickson), o nikafiyol makahid to saka tayra i roma kitakit ko mitiliday, mihayda to pitahidang no Canada Ciwlokiwkay, tayra i Taywan misinting, saka 10 folad tahini i Taywan. Mala mitomaliw to 'a'isidan no Tanciang congsie, Taypi singkakoyin (aniniay Taywan sinkakoyin) a yinciw. 1940 miheca, tona saka 2 kalaloodan no hekal, mapenec no Dipong ko Taywan sotofo, ci Son Yakop aci Son lilien miliyas to Taywan, tayra i katimol Amilika nikowanan no Inkiris a Guyana mitingto. I 1945 miheca, paherek ko kalalood no Taypinyang, patiko tayni Taywan ci Son Yakop. I 1948 miheca, padoedo cingra malayinciw no Taywan sinkakoyin, tangasa 1965 miheca misawad. O pikerid ningra to demak no pitilidan, o nai Taypisi Suanglien malinah tayra aniniay lotok no Yangmingsan. Roma, itira cingra i 'amisay no Taywan padama to kapah no kiwkay mifalicay onto (fa'elohay tamdaw onto), micikeroh to pipatenak i yincumin no Taywan, patireng to 385 kiwkay ato micikeroh sapipatireng to Yusan sinkakoyin. Roma no pisinting, ci Son Yakop itira i 1947 miheca tayra i Sanghai mitahidang to takaraway wiyinhuy no MCC miocor to isingan tayni Taywan patado lotokay a yincumin, oya MCC i saka 2 miheca maocor ko papinapina ising ato kangkofo masakapot MCC santi mililisay isingan tayni Taywan, malakapot to ni Son lilien itini pasawali ato pasaetip no Taywan lotokan to isingan ato padamaay tayal . Rama mararid cingra pakayni Taywan Kristo ciwlo kiwkay a kinaira, padama to fafahi ci Son lilienan to saki syakay sakalemed tayal i Taywan . I 1967 miheca, ciadada ci Son Yakop to pona' adada a mapatay, matadem i Taywan sinkakoyin. Midotoc ci Son lilien to naikoran ningra, saka tosa miheca patireng to matodohay ceka roma kitakit sintokay, sa'ayaway maocor ko yincumin no Taywan tayra i Sarawak no Malaysia mipatenak to ratoh .
S.PHON: == so~un jako~up fo~uksi == so~un jako~up (inkiris: *am…ôs ira …¨~…ģi ¶kso~un, **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ * **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ ) fo~uksi, maso~ufo~u ¶ i katimo~u…ĺ …¨~…ģako~uta no~u ami…ĺika, kristo~ukiw ¶iw…ĺo~u kiwkaj a siŇčkiwsi, o~u fa °inaj ni so~u~un …ĺi…ĺian (…ĺi…ĺ…ĺian r. …¨~…ģi ¶kso~un) patir…ôŇčaj to~u kristo~ukiw sapa…ĺo~uma …ĺ…ôkapo~ut tam…¨~…ģaw, tajni tajwan ma…ĺa miko~utajaj °a °isi…¨~…ģan no~u tamkaŇč ¶o~uŇčkako~u, tajwan sinkako~ujin ato~u tajwan kristo~u ¶iw…ĺo~u kiwkaj s…ôisńßo~u kako~ujin a °a °isi…¨~…ģan, misaro~u ¶o~ur ko~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° saki jin ¶o~u~umin no~u tajwan sinkiw ato~u kiwiko~u a taja…ĺ. i **** mińß…ô ¶a o~una ¶ia…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa a mapataj, mata…¨~…ģ…ôm i tajwan sinkako~ujin . kaso~ufo~u ¶an i **** mińß…ô ¶a misawa…¨~…ģ nai sinkako~ujin no~u prin ¶…ôto~un …¨~…ģajkako~u. to~uja mińß…ô ¶a, mararamo~u…¨~…ģ a ¶i so~u~un …ĺi…ĺian (…ĺi…ĺ…ĺian r. …¨~…ģi ¶kso~un), o~u nikafijo~u…ĺ makańßi…¨~…ģ to~u saka tajra i ro~uma kitakit ko~u miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj, mińßaj…¨~…ģa to~u pitańßi…¨~…ģaŇč no~u ¶ana…¨~…ģa ¶iw…ĺo~ukiwkaj, tajra i tajwan misintiŇč, saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ tańßini i tajwan. ma…ĺa mito~uma…ĺiw to~u °a °isi…¨~…ģan no~u tan ¶iaŇč ¶o~uŇčsi…ô, tajpi siŇčkako~ujin (aniniaj tajwan sinkako~ujin) a jin ¶iw. **** mińß…ô ¶a, to~una saka * ka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģan no~u ńß…ôka…ĺ, map…ôn…ô ¶ no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč ko~u tajwan so~uto~ufo~u, ¶i so~un jako~up a ¶i so~un …ĺi…ĺi…ôn mi…ĺijas to~u tajwan, tajra i katimo~u…ĺ ami…ĺika niko~uwanan no~u inkiris a *o~u~ujana mitiŇčto~u. i **** mińß…ô ¶a, pańß…ôr…ôk ko~u ka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ no~u tajpinjaŇč, patiko~u tajni tajwan ¶i so~un jako~up. i **** mińß…ô ¶a, pa…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u ¶iŇčra ma…ĺajin ¶iw no~u tajwan sinkako~ujin, taŇčasa **** mińß…ô ¶a misawa…¨~…ģ. o~u pik…ôri…¨~…ģ niŇčra to~u …¨~…ģ…ômak no~u piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan, o~u nai tajpisi so~u~uaŇč…ĺi…ôn ma…ĺinańß tajra aniniaj …ĺo~uto~uk no~u jaŇčmiŇčsan. ro~uma, itira ¶iŇčra i °amisaj no~u tajwan pa…¨~…ģama to~u kapańß no~u kiwkaj mifa…ĺi ¶aj o~unto~u (fa °…ô…ĺo~uńßaj tam…¨~…ģaw o~unto~u), mi ¶ik…ôro~uńß to~u pipat…ônak i jin ¶o~u~umin no~u tajwan, patir…ôŇč to~u *** kiwkaj ato~u mi ¶ik…ôro~uńß sapipatir…ôŇč to~u jo~u~usan sinkako~ujin. ro~uma no~u pisintiŇč, ¶i so~un jako~up itira i **** mińß…ô ¶a tajra i saŇčńßai mitańßi…¨~…ģaŇč to~u takarawaj wijinńßo~u~uj no~u m ¶ ¶ mio~u ¶o~ur to~u isiŇčan tajni tajwan pata…¨~…ģo~u …ĺo~uto~ukaj a jin ¶o~u~umin, o~uja m ¶ ¶ i saka * mińß…ô ¶a mao~u ¶o~ur ko~u papinapina isiŇč ato~u kaŇčko~ufo~u masakapo~ut m ¶ ¶ santi mi…ĺi…ĺisaj isiŇčan tajni tajwan, ma…ĺakapo~ut to~u ni so~un …ĺi…ĺi…ôn itini pasawa…ĺi ato~u pasa…ôtip no~u tajwan …ĺo~uto~ukan to~u isiŇčan ato~u pa…¨~…ģamaaj taja…ĺ . rama marari…¨~…ģ ¶iŇčra pakajni tajwan kristo~u ¶iw…ĺo~u kiwkaj a kinaira, pa…¨~…ģama to~u fafańßi ¶i so~un …ĺi…ĺi…ônan to~u saki sjakaj saka…ĺ…ôm…ô…¨~…ģ taja…ĺ i tajwan . i **** mińß…ô ¶a, ¶ia…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa ¶i so~un jako~up to~u po~una ° a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa a mapataj, mata…¨~…ģ…ôm i tajwan sinkako~ujin. mi…¨~…ģo~uto~u ¶ ¶i so~un …ĺi…ĺi…ôn to~u naiko~uran niŇčra, saka to~usa mińß…ô ¶a patir…ôŇč to~u mato~u…¨~…ģo~uńßaj ¶…ôka ro~uma kitakit sinto~ukaj, sa °ajawaj mao~u ¶o~ur ko~u jin ¶o~u~umin no~u tajwan tajra i sarawak no~u ma…ĺajsia mipat…ônak to~u rato~uńß .
S.FORM: == Son Yakop foksi == Son Yakop (Inkiris: James Ira Dickson, 1900 miheca 2 folad 23 romi'ad ‚Äď 1967 miheca 6 folad 15 romi'ad ) foksi, masofoc i Katimol Dakota no Amilika, Kristokiw Ciwlo kiwkay a Singkiwsi, o fa'inay ni Sun Lilian (Lillian R. Dickson) patirengay to Kristokiw sapaloma lekapot tamdaw, tayni Taywan mala mikotayay 'a'isidan no Tamkang Congkako, Taywan sinkakoyin ato Taywan Kristo Ciwlo kiwkay Seisho kakoyin a 'a'isidan, misarocor ko faloco' saki yincumin no Taywan sinkiw ato kiwiko a tayal. I 1967 miheca ona ciadada a mapatay, matadem i Taywan sinkakoyin . Kasofocan I 1927 miheca misawad nai sinkakoyin no Princeton daykako. Toya miheca, mararamod aci Sun Lilian (Lillian R. Dickson), o nikafiyol makahid to saka tayra i roma kitakit ko mitiliday, mihayda to pitahidang no Canada Ciwlokiwkay, tayra i Taywan misinting, saka 10 folad tahini i Taywan. Mala mitomaliw to 'a'isidan no Tanciang congsie, Taypi singkakoyin (aniniay Taywan sinkakoyin) a yinciw. 1940 miheca, tona saka 2 kalaloodan no hekal, mapenec no Dipong ko Taywan sotofo, ci Son Yakop aci Son lilien miliyas to Taywan, tayra i katimol Amilika nikowanan no Inkiris a Guyana mitingto. I 1945 miheca, paherek ko kalalood no Taypinyang, patiko tayni Taywan ci Son Yakop. I 1948 miheca, padoedo cingra malayinciw no Taywan sinkakoyin, tangasa 1965 miheca misawad. O pikerid ningra to demak no pitilidan, o nai Taypisi Suanglien malinah tayra aniniay lotok no Yangmingsan. Roma, itira cingra i 'amisay no Taywan padama to kapah no kiwkay mifalicay onto (fa'elohay tamdaw onto), micikeroh to pipatenak i yincumin no Taywan, patireng to 385 kiwkay ato micikeroh sapipatireng to Yusan sinkakoyin. Roma no pisinting, ci Son Yakop itira i 1947 miheca tayra i Sanghai mitahidang to takaraway wiyinhuy no MCC miocor to isingan tayni Taywan patado lotokay a yincumin, oya MCC i saka 2 miheca maocor ko papinapina ising ato kangkofo masakapot MCC santi mililisay isingan tayni Taywan, malakapot to ni Son lilien itini pasawali ato pasaetip no Taywan lotokan to isingan ato padamaay tayal . Rama mararid cingra pakayni Taywan Kristo ciwlo kiwkay a kinaira, padama to fafahi ci Son lilienan to saki syakay sakalemed tayal i Taywan . I 1967 miheca, ciadada ci Son Yakop to pona' adada a mapatay, matadem i Taywan sinkakoyin. Midotoc ci Son lilien to naikoran ningra, saka tosa miheca patireng to matodohay ceka roma kitakit sintokay, sa'ayaway maocor ko yincumin no Taywan tayra i Sarawak no Malaysia mipatenak to ratoh .

¶o~ur to~u isiŇčan tajni tajwan pata…¨~…ģo~u …ĺo~uto~ukaj a jin ¶o~u~umin, o~uja m ¶ ¶ i saka * mińß…ô ¶a mao~u ¶o~ur ko~u papinapina isiŇč ato~u kaŇčko~ufo~u masakapo~ut m ¶ ¶ santi mi…ĺi…ĺisaj sinto~ukaj, sa °ajawaj mao~u ¶o~ur ko~u jin ¶o~u~umin no~u tajwan tajra i sarawak no~u ma…ĺajsia mipat…ônak to~u rato~uńß .
